description:
Implement `hx-data-table` (T2 tier) — 4/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Enterprise data table with sorting, selection, and pagination.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-data-table/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-data-table.ts`, `hx-data-table.styles.ts`, `hx-data-table.stories.ts`, `hx-data-table.test.ts`

**Props:** `columns` (JSON array of `{key, label, sortable?, width?}`), `rows` (JSON array of row data objects), `selectable` (boolean — row checkboxes), `sortKey` (string), `sortDirection` (`asc`|`desc`), `loading` (boolean), `emptyLabel` (string), `stickyHeader` (boolean)

**Events:** `hx-sort` (`{key, direction}`), `hx-select` (`{selectedRows}`), `hx-row-click` (`{row, index}`)

**Slots:** `toolbar` (above table), `empty` (empty state), `loading` (skeleton override)

**CSS Parts:** `table`, `thead`, `tbody`, `tr`, `th`, `td`, `sort-icon`, `checkbox`

**ARIA:** `role="grid"`, column headers with `aria-sort` (`ascending`|`descending`|`none`). Selectable rows: `aria-selected`. Loading: `aria-busy="true"`.

**Critical:** Responsive — horizontal scroll container on mobile. Header cells are `<button>` for sortable columns. Keyboard: Arrow keys navigate cells, Space toggles row selection.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (sort, select, empty state, loading), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with all features, bundle < 8KB (complexity exception granted).

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-data-table — T2 Data Table/Grid
